sale.term_condition_prefix: I am 20 years old and accept the
sale.term_condition_title: Please read and fully understand the terms and conditions.
sale.term_condition_1: By completing and submitting the online application form, you indicate that you accept these terms and conditions and wish to proceed with your application to join our affiliate program. You agree to the terms and conditions outlined below. If you do not agree with the terms and conditions (or are not authorized to do so), you should not proceed with the application. If you have any questions regarding our affiliate program or these terms and conditions, please contact the relevant affiliate team.
sale.term_condition_2: This agreement outlines all the terms and conditions of being a customer for the affiliate program. "Affiliate" refers to any individual, group, or entity registered with us as an affiliate under this agreement and shall include employees, officers, directors, shareholders, owners, controllers, and affiliates, both individuals and entities.
sale.term_condition_3: We do not own any information or content ("Content") that you provide on the website for the purpose of using the services. You are solely responsible for the accuracy, quality, completeness, legality, reliability, appropriateness, and intellectual property ownership or right to use all content submitted. We may monitor and review content on the website submitted or created by you through the services. Your use of the website does not grant us the right to use, reproduce, adapt, modify, publish, or distribute any content you create or store in your user account for commercial, marketing, or similar purposes unless you provide specific permission to do so. However, you grant us the right to access, copy, distribute, store, transmit, reformat, and display the content of your user account solely for the purpose of providing services to you. We reserve the right to refuse or remove any content that violates our policies, is inappropriate, or is harmful in any way to the terms and conditions at our discretion, without limiting the representations and warranties we have set forth.
sale.term_condition_4: You must pay any fees or charges for your account usage according to the fees, charges, and billing terms when payment is due. If a free trial service is offered, you may be required to make a payment after the free trial period ends—not when you enter your billing details (which may be required before the free trial begins). If auto-renewal is enabled for the services you have selected, you will be charged automatically according to the terms you selected. If we determine that your transaction is high-risk, we may request a copy of a government-issued photo ID or a recent bank statement for the credit or debit card used for the purchase.

register.validate_msg_1: Contains at least 8 characters or numbers, no spaces and no special characters.
register.name: Name

policy.condition_1: Please read and understand the Terms and Conditions carefully. By completing and submitting the online application form, you indicate your acceptance of these Terms and Conditions and wish to proceed with your application to join our Affiliate Program. You agree to the Terms and Conditions below. If you do not agree to the Terms and Conditions (or are not permitted to do so), you should not proceed with your application. For any questions regarding our Affiliate Program or these Terms and Conditions, please contact the relevant Affiliate Representative.
policy.condition_2: This Agreement details all terms and conditions of being a Client for the Program. "Affiliate" means any person, group or legal entity registered with us as an Affiliate under this Agreement and shall be deemed to include our employees, officers, directors, shareholders, owners, controllers and affiliates, such individuals and legal entities.
policy.condition_3: We do not own any information or content (“Content”) that you provide on the Website for the purpose of using the Services. You are solely responsible for the accuracy, quality, completeness, legality, reliability, appropriateness and intellectual property ownership or rights to use all Content submitted. We may monitor and review Content submitted on the Website or created by you in connection with the Services. Your use of the Website does not grant us a license to use, reproduce, modify, edit, publish or distribute Content created by you or stored in your User Account for commercial, marketing or similar purposes, unless you specifically grant us a license. However, you grant us a right to access, copy, distribute, store, transmit, reformat and display the Content of your User Account solely for the purposes of providing the Services to you. We reserve the right to refuse or remove any Content that violates our policies, is inappropriate or is in any way harmful to the Terms and Conditions in our sole discretion, without limiting the representations and warranties we have made.
policy.condition_4: You will be required to pay any applicable fees or surcharges for your Account as applicable fees, surcharges and billing terms and conditions apply when due. In the case of a free trial of a Service, you may be required to pay after the end of the free trial period, not when you enter your billing details (which may be required prior to the start of the free trial period). If automatic renewal is enabled for a Service you have opted in to, you will be automatically charged in accordance with the terms you have selected. If we determine that your transaction constitutes a high-risk transaction, we will require you to provide a copy of the cardholder's government-issued photo ID or a copy of a recent bank statement for the credit or debit card used to make the purchase.
